title: limnorchis stricta
intro: Limnorchis stricta, also known as the orchid of the sea, is a species of flowering plant in the family Orchidaceae. It is a type of epiphytic orchid that is native to tropical and subtropical regions of the world. Limnorchis stricta has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it useful for treating wounds, skin conditions, and respiratory issues. In herbal preparations, the plant can be made into teas, tinctures, or infusions to take advantage of its health benefits, such as reducing inflammation, relieving coughs, and promoting healing.
